<[fim-suffix]>
code after editable region
<[fim-prefix]><filename>related/file.py
related file content

<filename>edit_history
--- a/some_file.py
+++ b/some_file.py
-old
+new

<filename>path/to/target_file.py
code before editable region
<|marker_1|>
code that
needs to<|user_cursor|>
be rewritten
<|marker_2|>
<[fim-middle]>
